title: At The Lamb's High Feast
music: Czech, Kirchengeseng, 1566 Brian J. Dumont, 31 Dec 2009

lyrics.v1: At the Lamb's high feast we sing, Praise to our victorious King, Who has washed us in the tide Flowing from his piercèd side; Alleluia!
lyrics.v2: Praise we Him, whose love divine Gives His sacred blood for wine, Gives His body for the feast, Christ the Victim, Christ the Priest. Alleluia!
lyrics.v3: Where the Paschal blood is poured, Death's dark angel sheathes his sword; Israel's hosts triumphant go Through the wave that drowns the foe. Alleluia!
lyrics.v4: Praise we Christ, whose blood was shed, Paschal Victim, Paschal Bread; With sinceri- ty and love Eat we Manna from above. Alleluia!
lyrics.v5: Mighty Victim from the sky, Hell's fierce pow'rs beneath Thee lie; Thou hast conquered in the fight, Thou hast brought us life and light; Alleluia!
